name: Key Collector → On Result
description: An automation to perform when the key sequence has been finished (eg. `max_length` has been reached or one of the `end_keys` was pressed). The finalized key sequence is placed in a `vector<uint8_t>` variable `x`, `start` holds the start key that activated this key sequence or else `0`, and `end` holds the end key that terminated this key sequence or else `0`.
